name: MHA- Coming To America
description:
MHA

You’ll be traveling to America with the Pro Heroes

I’ll just choose 6

1. All Might

2. Endeavor

3. Hawks

4. Mirko

5. Best Jeanist

6. Ryukyu

I just put 6 top heroes I know folks like so I’ll make them the prime focus for this rp

In this RP yes you’ll be on a Jet to America but like if you want more to it I had made a second scenario of a mission in Los Angeles. So you can do hero stuff. I made new villains and etc. I didn’t determine if you’re a pro hero student or villain so you could create your own drama.

**Mission Overview: "Operation Skyfall**

Codename heroes safehouse: "The Chateau"
